description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a rich brown material that appears to be leather or faux leather. The sofa features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both with a slightly overstuffed appearance for added comfort. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, extending from the base to the height of the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, matching the clean lines of the overall design. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the sofa sits directly on a concealed base. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A contemporary brown two-seater sofa with plush seat and back cushions, broad padded armrests, and smooth leather-like upholstery. The design is boxy and modern, with no visible legs or decorative patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, with broad armrests on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, highlighting the armrest and cushion depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and padded armrests at each end, extending from the base to the height of the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a concealed or recessed base, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown color with a smooth, leather-like texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
